title: rubus friesianus
intro: Rubus frisianus, also known as the wild raspberry, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus frisianus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus frisianus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of menopause.
